issues.description: Missing condition: effect requires resting 'this Character and 1 of your {Dressrosa} type Leader or Stage cards' as a cost. Needs condition to check for available Dressrosa card to rest.
Rest action incomplete: must rest both 'this Character' AND '1 of your {Dressrosa} type Leader or Stage cards'. Currently only rests Self. Need second Rest action or composite target.

Target scope incorrect: 'up to 1' means optional selection of 0 or 1 opponent Character. Current 'ChooseOpponentCharacter' implies mandatory selection. Should be 'OptionalChooseOpponentCharacter' or similar optional variant.
Duration correct as 'EndOfTurn' (matches 'during this turn' phrasing), but verify it aligns with turn timing—should apply only during the current turn then expire.
